---
title: "Group 3 Individual Participation Report"
author: "Sora Hosoda"
date: today
format: html
---

# Individual Participation Report

## Group Information

- **Group:** 3
- **Project:** Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing
- **Group Members:** Jungmin Woo, Sandy Zhu (Qian), Grace Sen, Sora Hosoda, Yushan Huang

## My Contributions

At this stage of the project, I contributed to both the project planning and the presentation development. My responsibilities included:

- Contributed to the shared RevealJS presentation on GitHub.
- Developed the **Prediction Plan** section of the presentation.
- Prepared the **Expected Insights** section by identifying the expected outcomes of the analysis.
- Participated in group discussions about the project direction and predictive modeling approach.
- Reviewed the shared presentation and collaborated with teammates through GitHub.

## Reflection

Working on this project helped me understand how predictive analytics can be applied to digital marketing data. Collaborating through GitHub also gave me experience using version control in a team environment. As the project continues, I plan to contribute to model development, result interpretation, and the final presentation.
